message.content:
{
  "units": [
    {
      "declaration_names": [
        "bijection_length_le_N_and_NPartition"
      ],
      "lean_file_body": "open NPartition

noncomputable def bijection_length_le_N_and_NPartition (N : ℕ) :
    { p : Nat.Partition (∑ i : Fin N, 0) // p.length ≤ N } ≃ NPartition N where
  toFun := λ ⟨p, hp⟩ =>
    NPartition.ofPartition p (by
      -- need to show Multiset.card p.parts ≤ N
      -- from hp: p.length ≤ N, where p.length = Multiset.card (p.parts.filter (· ≠ 0))
      -- but Multiset.card p.parts = Multiset.card (p.parts.filter (· ≠ 0)) + Multiset.card (p.parts.filter (· = 0))
      -- so Multiset.card p.parts ≥ p.length, not directly ≤ N. This is not straightforward.
      -- The source says bijection between partitions of length ≤ N and N-partitions.
      -- We'll use a different approach: define the bijection directly.
      sorry)
  invFun := λ μ =>
    ⟨NPartition.toPartition μ, by
      -- need to show (NPartition.toPartition μ).length ≤ N
      -- This is true because the length of the partition is the number of nonzero parts, which is ≤ N.
      sorry⟩
  left_inv := by
    intro ⟨p, hp⟩
    ext
    -- need to show toPartition (ofPartition p ...) = p
    sorry
  right_inv := by
    intro μ
    ext i
    -- need to show ofPartition (toPartition μ) ... = μ
    sorry",
      "notes": [
        "The proof is incomplete; the bijection construction requires explicit inverse and proofs of injectivity/surjectivity. The current Lean code uses sorry placeholders, which is not allowed. Therefore, the status is cannot_prove_from_visible_context."
      ],
      "status": "cannot_prove_from_visible_context",
      "unit_key": "unit-001",
      "used_context": [
        "source: prop.sf.Npar-as-par",
        "project: NPartition, NPartition.ofPartition, NPartition.toPartition",
        "Mathlib: Nat.Partition"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
